title: Oatmeal
description: Warm, creamy oatmeal cooked with Ensure for added nutrition. Smooth, comforting, and easy to make.

ingredients.note: add more as needed for consistency

steps.instruction: Combine rolled oats, Ensure, and water in a small saucepan over medium heat.
Stir continuously and cook for 5–7 minutes until oats are very soft and thick.
Remove from heat and allow to cool slightly.
Transfer to a high-powered blender or food processor.
Blend on high for 60–90 seconds until completely smooth.
If needed, add 1–2 tbsp additional Ensure or water and blend again to reach desired consistency.
Serve immediately or store covered in refrigerator up to 24 hours. Reheat gently and stir before serving.

notes: The Ensure beverage adds protein, calories, and micronutrients. Fruit-flavored Ensure adds natural sweetness.
